PP.summary: Korean competition intensifies; prices down VND 500-1,000/kg
paras: Asian PP homo fell sharply USD 90-130/tonne
Hanwha Korea remains cheapest at VND 30,000/kg

PE.summary: US import pressure continues; Vietnam showing lowest regional prices
paras: US PE offers: LLDPE USD 850-880/tonne; HDPE USD 930-970/tonne
Sabic settlement prices fell very sharply
Domestic downside pressure persists despite cautious adjustments

PVC.summary: Abundant supply; domestic coal-based SG-5 steady at VND 20,500/kg
paras: Asian PVC prices fell to USD 690-720/tonne/CFR
Room to fall with crude oil prices declining
